frame_interpretation.robot_pose: gripper/flange pose expressed in robot base frame (^bT_g)
frame_interpretation.target_pose_in_camera_frame: raw Charuco board pose from OpenCV: board origin expressed in camera frame (^cT_t)
frame_interpretation.overlay_axis_origin_in_camera_frame: the axis anchor currently drawn in the detection overlay, expressed in camera frame
frame_interpretation.overlay_first_corner_in_camera_frame: the selected visible Charuco corner helper point, expressed in camera frame
frame_interpretation.camera_pose_in_target_frame: inverse of the raw detection pose: camera expressed in calibration target frame (^tT_c)
frame_interpretation.robot_state_debug: raw robot-side debug fields captured with the sample, including active TCP/world offsets when available

target_pose_in_camera_frame.origin_note: This is the Charuco board origin from OpenCV pose solve, not the drawn overlay axis origin/top corner.

overlay_axis_origin_in_camera_frame.origin_note: This matches the displayed overlay axis anchor, which may differ from the raw Charuco board origin used by tvec/rvec.

overlay_first_corner_in_camera_frame.origin_note: This is the selected visible Charuco corner/top-corner helper, not the raw Charuco board origin.
